content: I looked at my watch—it said 10:34 in the morning. Suddenly, there was a loud boom, and I imagined the plane exploding over the big, blue ocean below. But then, my eyes snapped open—I wasn’t falling or flying; I was safe in my airplane seat. I heard the soft humming sound of the plane’s engine, just like before. I checked my watch again, but this time it said 9:35—an hour earlier than before! Suddenly, I realized I had a chance to change what was going to happen! I looked around carefully, hoping to spot anything that might stop the scary explosion. Just then, I noticed a small warning light blinking on the control panel in front of me. I reached out quickly, hoping I could fix the problem before it was too late. The plane shuddered a little, but the warning light went off, and the engine’s hum grew steadier. I smiled, feeling proud that I had stopped the scary dream from coming true. As the plane flew smoothly over the sparkling ocean, I knew I’d never forget this strange morning.
